text: A library has 36,852 books. What is the difference between the value of the digit 3 and the value of the digit 8 in this number?
generatorSolution:
Step 1: Identify the value of the digit 3 in 36,852. The digit 3 is in the ten-thousands place, so its value is 30,000.

Step 2: Identify the value of the digit 8 in 36,852. The digit 8 is in the hundreds place, so its value is 800.

Step 3: Find the difference between these two values: 30,000 − 800 = 29,200.

The correct answer is 29,200.
